rationale: SSL certificate diagnostic improvement; error handling/usability issue, no specific spec rule violated.
Documentation typo in tutorial code example (a1 vs a2); no driver behavior involved.
API ergonomics improvement to support document-level iteration alongside batch iteration; no spec rule violated.
Documentation bug report about BsonExtraElements null during ISupportInitialize.EndInit; C#-specific serialization edge case.
Performance regression between 1.6.1 and 1.9.2; no spec rule contradicted.
Documentation request for GeoJSON sub-documents and indexes; no driver behavior involved.
MapReduce with scope variable triggers server canonicalization error; not a spec-covered area.
API ergonomics: DocumentsAffected throws KeyNotFoundException for index errors; no spec rule specifies this behavior.
Dictionary<IPAddress,string> serialization representation changed between v1.9 and v2.0; backwards-compat issue, not BSON spec violation.
DecoderFallbackException on invalid UTF-8 bytes; internal BSON reading implementation issue, no spec rule explicitly violated.
Driver fails to reconnect after brief unavailability; implementation bug in connection state management, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Stack overflow serializing dynamic multi-select list; C#-specific serializer recursion bug, no spec rule involved.
SDAM spec defines minHeartbeatFrequencyMS=500ms; driver had 10ms and is being corrected. Depends on DRIVERS-209.
Server-side memory pressure with GridFS writes; server performance concern, not a driver spec issue.
Feature request for IControlledSerialization interface; API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
LINQ provider feature: support private backing fields in queries; C#-specific language binding, not spec related.
InsertBatch with empty IEnumerable sends invalid message; driver improvement for edge case, no spec rule specifies this.
Documentation clarification request for SafeMode true/false and w=0/1 behavior; docs issue, not driver bug.
Internal buffer strategy optimization for input vs output buffers; performance/architecture improvement, no spec behavior change.
Abstract IBsonChunkSource interface for pluggable buffer pool strategies; internal architecture, no spec behavior involved.
Investigation of BsonClassMap.RegisterClassMap<IInterface> behavior; API investigation, no spec rule involved.
Single/SingleOrDefaultAsync incorrectly overwrites existing limit=1 with 2; driver API logic bug, no spec rule specifies this behavior.
Feature request to expose sort/skip/limit from LINQ query object; debugging/API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Feature request for LINQ query visualization/ToString support; developer tooling, no spec rule involved.
LINQ provider fails with byte-backed enum in where clause; C#-specific LINQ translation bug, no spec rule involved.
LINQ provider can't serialize nullable DateTime HasValue; C#-specific type handling, no spec rule violated.
LINQ provider feature request for string.CompareTo support; C#-specific language binding improvement, no spec rule involved.
LINQ String.IsNullOrEmpty doesn't account for BsonIgnoreIfNull; C#-specific attribute interaction bug, no cross-language spec rule.
LINQ provider doesn't support Any() on List<string> in OData context; C#-specific LINQ/OData limitation, no spec rule involved.
LINQ provider doesn't support nested Take/Skip in OData expand queries; C#-specific LINQ limitation, no spec rule involved.
LINQ Where().OrderBy().Take().Any() translates incorrectly; C#-specific LINQ translation bug, no cross-driver spec rule.
Chained LINQ query on IQueryable<IInterface> throws serializer exception; C#-specific type system issue, no spec rule involved.
MissingMethodException enumerating IQueryable<Abstract>; C#-specific LINQ/reflection bug, no spec rule involved.
ReadPreferenceServerSelector.ToString() doesn't expand TagSets; diagnostic output quality, no spec rule specifies ToString format.
API convenience: implicit conversion between FieldDefinition generic variants; C#-specific API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Server selection spec defines serverSelectionTimeoutMS as connection string option; driver doesn't expose it at the high-level API.
Find fluent API ToString() should output shell-compatible syntax; developer ergonomics, no spec rule specifies this.
BSON deserializer EndOfStreamException when ignored element name is prefix of known element; internal class-map parsing bug.
LINQ aggregation silently drops predicates in $first/$last; should throw instead; C#-specific LINQ translation issue.
OData $expand + $top + PageSize triggers nested Skip/Take exception; C#-specific OData/LINQ interaction issue.
Dictionary serializer doesn't implement IBsonDocumentSerializer, blocking LINQ queries; C#-specific API improvement.
CRUD spec requires update documents contain operators; driver allows empty {} document resulting in unintended replacement.
Error messages in 2.0 driver are too generic; usability improvement, no spec rule specifies error message content.
WaitQueueSize setting not wired to server selection queue; internal configuration plumbing gap, CMAP spec doesn't prescribe this wiring.
BsonSerializationInfoFinder doesn't handle GetValue method call in LINQ; C#-specific serialization visitor bug.
Feature request for cursor.size() equivalent in fluent API; no spec defines this requirement.
LINQ Any() generates $elemMatch when a simpler dot-notation query would be faster; query optimization, not a spec violation.
Aggregation group projection fails with inherited class hierarchy; C#-specific BSON class map + aggregation interaction bug.
SDAM spec requires using electionId from ismaster to detect stale primaries; driver not yet implementing this. See DRIVERS-228.
SDAM spec defines 'me' field handling for replica set member canonical addresses; driver doesn't remove members with mismatched hostnames.
